audit_objective: Determine whether the remote schema can be safely treated as the ground truth baseline for the seven unrecovered historical migrations, enabling the ownership migration (202605070002) to be applied on top.

comparison_method.layer_a: live remote schema from Section 3 queries
comparison_method.layer_d: app code column expectations from runtime-repositories.ts and candidate-scoring-service.ts
required_outputs: objects present remotely but not locally (with full DDL)
objects expected by app code but missing remotely
objects with type or definition mismatch

D1.condition: Remote schema matches app expectations in all material ways; all unrecovered drift is explained by the seven remote-only versions; no unknown-drift objects; ownership columns correctly absent
D1.safe_action: Operator approves baseline marker migration + ownership migration apply

D2.condition: Remote schema contains intentional objects missing locally; objects are recognizable and safe; no conflicting types
D2.safe_action: Draft baseline reconciliation migration; operator approves; migration repair --status applied only after explicit in-session operator approval
D2.codex_may_execute: draft SQL only — no migration repair without operator approval

D3.condition: Remote schema contains unknown or risky drift: type conflicts, unexpected constraints, ownership columns partially present, unknown triggers or RLS policies
D3.safe_action: Stop. Record anomalies. Escalate to operator. No migration actions.

D4.condition: Remote schema cannot be inspected because connectivity/tooling remains broken
D4.safe_action: Resolve connectivity first. Rerun audit once inspectable.
forbidden_actions: inferring schema state from DNS errors
applying migrations while connectivity is broken
UPDATE pick_candidates SET model_registry_id = ... (historical ownership fabrication)
treating audit output as proof of schema correctness without operator review

phase6_codex_packet.goal: Inspect remote schema via Supabase MCP, dump full schema metadata, compare against local migrations and app expectations, classify D1/D2/D3/D4, produce audit artifact at docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-855/phase6-remote-schema-audit.json
phase6_codex_packet.stop_condition: After producing audit artifact and written report — operator must approve before Phase 7
